finding_results.notes: Reduced repeated buzz-formula beats in the target span to two explicit buzz lines and diversified other interruptions through vibration texture and screen-flash cues.
Kept one explicit hardening motif at the early lie beat, and replaced later recurrence with observable action/sensation (carton crush, chalky mouth, bruise-pressing retention of the false log).
Rebalanced numeric stress logging with embodied/non-numeric interior cues in both required zones while preserving Anika's logistics-driven stress voice.

summary: Applied prose/copyedit pass revisions for chapter_02 by removing formulaic interruption repetition, limiting the lie-hardening refrain to a single deliberate instance, and adding embodied stress responses to offset checklist literalism while preserving chapter continuity and voice constraints.
